name: delimp
description: DE-LIMP proteomics skills for Claude — agentic mass-spec search + differential expression.

plugins.name: proteomics-pipeline
plugins.description: End-to-end proteomics search + differential expression from raw .raw/.d/.mzML files (DIA-NN / Sage, limpa/limma). Auto-installs its toolchain, derives search parameters from the data type, writes a biological analysis report and a full reproducibility bundle, and packages results into tidy session folders.
